description:
You are an AV equipment support technician at Lakewood University. A professor reported a broken projector and you need to create a formal support ticket in FreeScout.

Send an email from the 'AV Support' mailbox to prof.martinez@lakewood-univ.edu, CC'ing deptchair.wilson@lakewood-univ.edu and facilities@lakewood-univ.edu.

Subject: Projector Maintenance Request - Room 301 Anderson Hall

Body:
Dear Prof. Martinez,

We have received your report about the malfunctioning Epson projector in Room 301, Anderson Hall. Our technician team has scheduled an on-site inspection for Thursday between 10 AM and 12 PM to assess the HDMI input failure and color calibration issues.

A portable projector has been reserved for your Wednesday lecture. Please contact ext. 4521 to arrange pickup.

Best regards,
AV Support Team

metadata.target_subject: Projector Maintenance Request - Room 301 Anderson Hall
